summary: Verified-consistent (no patch needed). The "39-eclipse 1991–2016 ensemble at 207 magnetic measurements" cited in WIN-013/014 matches WIN-068.detail_claim exactly ("Ensemble analysis of 207 geomagnetic manifestations from 100 INTERMAGNET observatories across 39 solar eclipses (1991–2016)"). Same counts also appear in part4 ("207 observations across 39 eclipses (1991-2016)"), part6 SEC-6.13 ("207 events across 39 eclipses"), part6 SEC-6.14 ("207 measurements across 100 INTERMAGNET observatories during 39 eclipses 1991–2016"), and part6 SEC-6.14 cross-ref list. All five mentions agree. Primary-source verification against Kim & Chang 2018 paper text was attempted but ScienceDirect article is paywalled and the digits appear only in SVG path data in the public HTML — internal-consistency check is the strongest available. Recommend close as verified-consistent. See findings_file closure_notes for full audit trail.
